overall.description: A smooth drone-like flight through a rocky canyon in a game engine, beginning along cliffside terrain beside a river, tilting up to reveal the sun and vertical cliff faces, then descending to glide along the water surface through the canyon.

agents.ego_description: moving steadily along the rocky canyon terrain beside the river, maintaining a consistent altitude

entered.detail: tall rocky cliff face with layered sedimentary rock and sparse vegetation patches
distant canyon wall with rugged rock formations
calm greenish water flowing through the canyon bottom
hazy mountain peaks visible through the canyon gap in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a smooth forward movement along a rocky canyon slope. The right canyon wall dominates the right side with its textured sedimentary layers, while the river flows calmly below to the right. Distant mountains are visible through the canyon gap ahead, bathed in warm golden hour light.

scene_state.functional_zone: vertical cliff face zone with direct sun exposure

events.description: camera begins tilting upward and turning left to look at the sky and sun
sun becomes directly visible creating a bright backlight and lens flare effect
camera tilts back down toward the river and canyon floor

agents.ego_description: pausing forward movement to look up at the sun and canyon walls, then descending toward water level

entered.detail: bright sun low in the sky creating a strong backlight and lens flare
steep illuminated rock face catching the direct sunlight high above

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the bright sun directly ahead, creating a dramatic backlight effect on the canyon walls. The left canyon wall moves closer to the foreground while the river temporarily exits the frame. After observing the sun and upper cliff faces, the camera tilts back down toward the water.

events.description: camera descends to water level and continues gliding along the river surface

agents.ego_description: gliding smoothly just above the water surface through the canyon, maintaining a low altitude

entered.detail: sandy shoreline along the water's edge with gentle slopes

segments.scene_description: The camera descends to skim along the river surface, with the water now filling the center of the frame. The right canyon wall looms closer on the right side, while the sun appears on the left horizon, casting long reflections across the calm water. The sandy riverbank becomes visible along the right shore as the journey continues through the canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins along a rocky canyon slope and descends to skim the surface of a river. It begins with a smooth forward glide past textured sedimentary layers on the right, with a calm river flowing below toward distant mountains bathed in golden hour light. As the camera tilts upward, the bright sun emerges directly ahead to create a dramatic backlight against the upper cliff faces before the view tilts back down toward the water. The scene then shifts as the camera descends to skim the river's surface, bringing the right canyon wall closer while the sun settles on the left horizon. Finally, the movement continues through the canyon, casting long reflections across the water and revealing a sandy riverbank along the right shore.
